title: 秋華賞の後に・アイツのいる場所へ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon crushes it at the Shuka Sho, and the
audience is abuzz with anticipation for a future
showdown between her and the Beast, Narita
Brian, who currently holds two Classic crowns.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During the post-race press conference, she
challenges Narita Brian to a one-on-one at the
upcoming Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian watches the broadcast in real time
and laughs to herself, impressed—but not
intimidated.
